## Problem and scope

Describe the concrete operator or contributor problem, the user-visible change,
and why this is the smallest useful scope. State the source of truth affected.

## Alternatives considered

Explain why existing code, documentation, or upstream tooling is insufficient.
If no change is the better choice, close the proposal instead of adding
speculative scaffolding.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the narrowest relevant Task or validator.
- [ ] I updated validators and documentation for changed contracts.
- [ ] I did not add secrets, real inventory, or generated runtime artifacts.
- [ ] I updated integration documentation when changing external-provider behavior.
- [ ] I did not add a duplicate configuration path, generic framework, or CI
      check without a current, owned contract to protect.
- [ ] This pull request contains one reviewable concern; unrelated cleanup is
      separate.
